testimonials.title: What Our Students Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from our Sanskrit learning community

testimonials.name: Dr. Sarah Johnson
testimonials.content: Learning Sanskrit through Shikshanam has transformed my understanding of Indian philosophy. The structured approach and expert guidance made complex texts accessible.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: The Sanskrit courses have deepened my yoga practice immensely. I can now understand the original texts and their profound meanings.
